review: Easy to use and quick service if you order ahead. Nice that credit card is already linked to app.
all.good

Truly terrible app. Aside from frequent crashing it seems to think I'm using my phone and driving when I move at a brisk walk. I foolishly decided to do a mobile order and long after people who ordered in store after me left I went to the cashier to ask if there were any problems. despite the order showing their store, they never received it. I asked for a refund because I had to go and they managed to pull out what I ordered from nowhere in 5 second. App still shows order in progress...

The app has been bricked for a subset of iOS users in Canada for months.
